Marathon Runners - Abilities, Stats & Best Builds

destroyer
vandal
recon
assassin

rook
Lunar work release // Opportunist // Limited
Abilities and Traits
Recuperation
Prime Ability
Activate your protype frame's emergency repair system to slowly restore health. Interrupted when you take damage.
Signal Mask
Tactical Ability
Activate a temporary holodisplay mask to deceive UESC forces, making them unaware of your presence. Distrupted when you sprint or take damage.
